scripts.check:lockfile: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const lock=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package-lock.json','utf8')); const root=(lock.packages&&lock.packages[''])||{}; const normalize=(obj)=>Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(obj||{}).sort(([a],[b])=>a.localeCompare(b))); const same=(a,b)=>{ const left=normalize(a); const right=normalize(b); return JSON.stringify(left)===JSON.stringify(right); }; if(!same(pkg.dependencies,root.dependencies)||!same(pkg.devDependencies,root.devDependencies)){ console.error('package.json and package-lock.json are out of sync. Run npm install and commit package-lock.json.'); process.exit(1); } console.log('package.json and package-lock.json root dependencies are in sync.');"
scripts.docker:build: npm run check:lockfile && docker compose build
scripts.docker:up: npm run check:lockfile && docker compose up
